_comment: Curated recipe set for the byrd-comfy-executor MCP (Role A, docs/BYRDCODER_COMFY_MCP.md). ONLY entries listed here are executable by the local coding agent — the full workflows/ and recipes/ directories are deliberately NOT auto-exposed. Adding an entry is a founder decision: recipe must exist, workflow path must live under workflows/, every overridable parameter must be mapped here with type + bounds (unmapped overrides are rejected by name). 'slot' routes an override into the recipe's slots; 'top' routes it to a top-level job payload field.

fast_preview.description: 12-step speed run for composition/prompt previews — the harmless default for executor smoke tests (batch of drafts, no identity, no LoRA).

hires_art.description: 30-step quality pass with 1.5x hires scale — for winners picked from fast_preview batches.
